definition.description:
Update parameters for an existing Subscription Group.
Specified fields will be updated, and there is no change for other fields.
An empty list will remove all members.

integration.description: Update the Integrations in the Subscription Group.
integration.name: integration

by.description:
Choose to specify the integration by name or by ID.
IDs are automatically unique, if you use a non-unique name,
it will result in an error.
by.name: by

integrationToAdd.description: Add specific Integrations to the current Integrations in the Subscription Group
integrationToAdd.name: integrationToAdd

by.description:
Choose to specify the integration by name or by ID.
IDs are automatically unique, if you use a non-unique name,
it will result in an error.
by.name: by

integrationToRemove.description: Remove specific Integrations to the current Integrations in the Subscription Group
integrationToRemove.name: integrationToRemove

by.description:
Choose to specify the integration by name or by ID.
IDs are automatically unique, if you use a non-unique name,
it will result in an error.
by.name: by

mailingList.description: Update the existing emails in the Subscription Group Mailing List.
mailingList.name: mailingList

by.description:
Specify the Mailing List by name or by ID.
IDs are automatically unique, if you use a non-unique name,
it will result in an error.
by.name: by

mailingListToAdd.description: Add specific emails to the current Mailing List in the Subscription Group
mailingListToAdd.name: mailingListToAdd

by.description:
Specify the Mailing List by name or by ID.
IDs are automatically unique, if you use a non-unique name,
it will result in an error.
by.name: by

mailingListToRemove.description: Remove specific emails to the current Mailing List in the Subscription Group
mailingListToRemove.name: mailingListToRemove

by.description:
Specify the Mailing List by name or by ID.
IDs are automatically unique, if you use a non-unique name,
it will result in an error.
by.name: by

subscriptionGroup.description: The Subscription Group to be updated.
subscriptionGroup.name: subscriptionGroup

definition.name: UpdateSubscriptionGroupInput

updateSubscriptionGroup.description:
Updates an existing Subscription Group.
Subscription Groups combine Mailing Lists and integrations
(including webhooks) for sending notifications.

Usage limits:
- Maximum number of members in each Subscription Group: 100.
updateSubscriptionGroup.name: updateSubscriptionGroup

definition.name: UpdateSubscriptionGroupInput

updateSubscriptionGroup.description:
Updates an existing Subscription Group.
Subscription Groups combine Mailing Lists and integrations
(including webhooks) for sending notifications.

Usage limits:
- Maximum number of members in each Subscription Group: 100.
updateSubscriptionGroup.name: updateSubscriptionGroup

definition.description: Response payload for updating a Subscription Group.
Represents a Subscription Group that combines Mailing Lists and webhook integrations.

id.description: Unique identifier of the Subscription Group.
id.name: id

integration.description: Webhook integrations included in the Subscription Group.
integration.name: integration

definition.description: Container for listing webhook integrations associated with a Subscription Group.

webhookList.description: List of webhook integrations included in the Subscription Group.
webhookList.name: webhookList

definition.description:
Defines the structure of a webhook integration used to
send notifications to third-party services.

body.description: JSON template used to structure the webhook request body.
body.name: body

enabled.description: Indicates whether the webhook is currently enabled.
enabled.name: enabled

header.description: Optional custom headers sent with the webhook request.
header.name: header

id.description: Unique identifier of the webhook integration.
id.name: id

name.description: Display name of the webhook integration.
name.name: name

relatedWebhookId.description: Related webhook that provides the Correlation ID used for updates
relatedWebhookId.name: relatedWebhookId

requestMethod.description: HTTP method used when sending the webhook request (e.g., POST, PUT).
requestMethod.name: requestMethod

responseMapping.description:
Defines JSON path mappings used to extract values from the webhook response payload.
At present, only a single mapping is supported, with the key "correlationId".
The value must be a valid JSON path pointing to the field in the response payload that represents the correlation identifier (for example, result.sys_id).
responseMapping.name: responseMapping

url.description: Target URL where the webhook sends requests.
url.name: url

definition.name: Webhook
IntegrationList

mailingList.description: Mailing Lists included in the Subscription Group.
mailingList.name: mailingList

definition.description:
Represents a Mailing List entity, including its
unique ID, name, type, associated email addresses, administrators,
and audit metadata.

address.description: List of email addresses included in the Mailing List.
address.name: address

admin.description: List of account administrators assigned to manage the Mailing List.
admin.name: admin

definition.description: A reference identifying the Admin object. ID: Unique Admin Identifier, Name: The Admin Name
definition.name: AdminRef

audit.description: Audit metadata containing creation and modification details.
audit.name: audit

AdminRef.description: A reference identifying the Admin object. ID: Unique Admin Identifier, Name: The Admin Name
AdminRef.name: AdminRef

ApiKeyRef.description: A reference identifying the ApiKey object. ID: Unique ApiKey Identifier, Name: The ApiKey Name
ApiKeyRef.name: ApiKeyRef

id.description: Unique identifier of the Mailing List.
id.name: id

type.description: Specifies how the Mailing List addresses are defined (e.g., all admins, specific_emails, system).
type.name: type

definition.name: MailingList

name.description: Display name of the Subscription Group.
name.name: name

definition.name: SubscriptionGroup
UpdateSubscriptionGroupPayload
